title: Toll House Pie
ingredients: ¾ cup butter, melted and cooled
In a large bowl, beat eggs until foamy. Add white sugar, brown sugar, and flour; mix until well blended. Stir in melted butter, chocolate chips, and walnuts.
Pour batter into unbaked pie crust. Bake 1 hour, until set. Serve warm or at room temperature.
I’ve tried to copy The Dodo Restaurant’s Toll House Pie. This recipe doesn’t come close, but still yummy.
